Source   Edit  

Simultaneous Planetary Combat Resolution

Handles simultaneous resolution of Bombard, Invade, and Blitz orders to prevent first-mover advantages in planetary assaults.

Imports

simultaneous_types, simultaneous_resolver, ../gamestate, ../orders, ../order_types, ../logger, ../squadron, fleet_orders, ../../common/types/core

Procs

proc collectPlanetaryCombatIntents(state: GameState;
                                   orders: Table[HouseId, OrderPacket]): seq[
    PlanetaryCombatIntent] {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Collect all planetary combat attempts (Bombard, Invade, Blitz) Source   Edit   
proc detectPlanetaryCombatConflicts(intents: seq[PlanetaryCombatIntent]): seq[
    PlanetaryCombatConflict] {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Group planetary combat intents by target colony Source   Edit   
proc resolvePlanetaryCombat(state: var GameState;
                            orders: Table[HouseId, OrderPacket]; rng: var Rand): seq[
    PlanetaryCombatResult] {....raises: [KeyError, ValueError, Exception],
                             tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Main entry point: Resolve all planetary combat orders simultaneously Source   Edit   
proc resolvePlanetaryCombatConflict(state: var GameState;
                                    conflict: PlanetaryCombatConflict;
                                    rng: var Rand): seq[PlanetaryCombatResult] {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Resolve planetary combat conflict - strongest attacker wins (like colonization) Source   Edit   
proc wasPlanetaryCombatHandled(results: seq[PlanetaryCombatResult];
                               houseId: HouseId; fleetId: FleetId): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if a planetary combat order was already handled Source   Edit
